financialControl.title: Complete Financial Control On Construction Projects With BuilderTek
financialControl.description: Unify project spending, forecasting, billing, and workflows in one comprehensive, powerful Salesforce-powered construction software. Natively built on Salesforce, BuilderTek financial management software integrates budgets, contracts, change orders, and reporting. Every action aligns with real-time project performance and risk insights.

section.title: Financial Tools Designed for Construction Workflows
section.subtitle: Why builders choose BuilderTek for financial management in construction projects across North America

features.title: Real-Time Cost Tracking
features.description: Track budgets, commitments, and actuals in one place—with up-to-the-minute accuracy.

features.title: Automated Billing & Invoicing
features.description: Generate invoices directly from contract terms and change orders with minimal effort.

features.title: Change Order Financial Impact
features.description: Monitor how every change order affects the bottom line with full approval history.

features.title: Cash Flow & Forecasting
features.description: Project cash needs and identify cost pressures before they become problems.

features.title: Purchase Order Alignment
features.description: Link POs back to budgets and contracts to eliminate disconnects.

features.title: Audit-Ready Recordkeeping
features.description: Capture every financial action with timestamps, user history, and searchable logs.

section.title:
Sharper Financial Insight.
Stronger Project Outcomes.
section.description: BuilderTek Financial Management Tool gives in-depth insights into project financials. Unlock improved financial efficiency and profitability in a Salesforce-powered interface.

cards.title: Greater Financial Visibility
cards.description: One source of truth for costs, billing, and commitments—eliminating guesswork across finance and operations.

cards.title: Improved decision making
cards.description: Real-time visibility to respond to risk, optimize cash flow, and predict budget pressures.

cards.title: Better accountability and compliance
cards.description: Complete audit trails and version control reduce compliance risks and disputes.

build.title: Built for Precision, Control, and Speed

features.title: Budget vs. Actual Variance Reports
features.description: Compare planned vs. actual spending in real time.

features.title: Define & Track Budgets
features.description: Establish project budgets with cost codes aligned to your scope and track commitments daily.

features.title: Capture Costs & Change Orders
features.description: Monitor POs, invoices, and change orders against planned costs.

features.title: Reconcile & Bill
features.description: Generate invoices and align billing with contractual terms and progress.

features.title: Forecast Cash Requirements
features.description: Predict future cash flow needs with real-time data.

features.title: Report & Review
features.description: Use Salesforce dashboards to measure performance and inform decisions.
